tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin), suggesting possible renal dysfunction or nephrotic syndrome. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may indicate hypoglycemia or a hemoglobinopathy. Further nephrological and metabolic evaluation is recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
